productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Watch ME1099
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezel, stainless steel backDial style: Black dial with partially exposed mechanics, has hour and minutes hands, markingsFeatures: Four subdials for day, hour, seconds and date that obtain the power to wind itself from from the movement of your wrist, a screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black leather strap, secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
